items.name: Design Agent by Lokuma
items.tagline: The designer for your AI agents (Openclaw, CC, Codex)
items.description: Lokuma Design Agent, is an AI designer your agents can call, a design intelligence layer for agents like OpenClaw, Claude Code, or Codex. AI can generate almost anything. But generation isn’t design. Turning raw outputs into something clear, structured, and visually refined still requires design thinking. Built by design tool makers, Lokuma helps AI reason about layout, typography, and visual balance — transforming outputs into landing pages, websites, and campaign pages that feel designed.

items.name: Claude Cowork Projects
items.tagline: Tasks, context, and files organized in one workspace
items.description: Projects in Claude Cowork bring your tasks, files, instructions, and memory into one focused workspace on your desktop. Built for individuals and teams managing complex workflows, it keeps everything local, organized, and reusable so you can work faster with consistent context across tasks.

items.name: Fractal
items.tagline: The fastest way to ship exceptional ChatGPT apps
items.description: Fractal is the fastest way to ship exceptional ChatGPT apps. ChatGPT is becoming the AI app store, and those who ship first and iterate fastest will capture the opportunity. Fractal handles architecture planning, coding, testing, and deployment so you can focus on building something people love. Build exceptional ChatGPT apps in minutes, not weeks.

items.name: Vite+
items.tagline: The Unified Toolchain for the Web
items.description: Vite+ is a new unified toolchain and entry point to web application development. Manage your runtime, package manager, and frontend stack with one tool. curl -fsSL https://vite.plus | bash

items.name: Cursor Glass
items.tagline: Unified agent workspace with seamless cloud handoff power
items.description: Cursor Glass introduces a unified interface for managing agents, repositories, and cloud tasks in one place. With Cloud Handoff, agents can seamlessly switch between local machines and cloud environments mid-task, eliminating workflow breaks. Powered by Composer 2, it delivers strong coding performance at lower cost. Built for engineers running parallel agents, Glass reduces context-switching and brings real visibility.

items.name: Contral
items.tagline: The agentic IDE which teaches while you build.
items.description: Contral - The IDE that teaches you while you build. With Build Mode, you apply everything independently with context aware assistance that supports your thinking. Build with AI agents and learn along the way as you build. With Learn Mode, learn specific languages. You get step by step guidance, real time explanations, and direction as you work on actual tasks. 200+ developers are already on the waitlist. This is the first step towards changing how developers learn.

items.name: murmur
items.tagline: practice tough phone calls with AI before you make them
items.description: Dreading a phone call? Practice it first. Murmur is an iOS app that lets you rehearse real-life phone calls with AI before making them for real. Call your doctor about test results, negotiate rent, prep for a job interview, or handle a difficult return - in a safe, judgment-free space. Pick a scenario (40+ built-in, or create your own), have a real voice conversation with AI, get instant feedback on what you said and how to improve. Not a chatbot - a real voice call simulator with AI coaching.

items.name: Replit Agent 4
items.tagline: Build design, and ship anything AI fast in one flow
items.description: Replit Agent 4 is the first AI built for creative collaboration between humans and agents. Design on an infinite canvas, work with your team, run parallel agents, and ship working apps, sites, slides & more, it removes busywork so you can stay in flow and create faster. Submit requests in any order, and Agent 4 intelligently sequences them and executes in the best order. Creative flow, protected.

items.name: Mindspend
items.tagline: Track how you feel about spending, not just the numbers
items.description: Most budgeting apps track where your money goes. Mindspend tracks how you feel about it. Every purchase gets one of three emotion tags: worth it, okay, or regret. No categories, no bank linking, no complicated setup. Just one simple question after each purchase: how did that feel? After a few weeks, you see your spending patterns through a completely different lens. It's not about restricting yourself. It's about understanding yourself.

items.name: Novi Notes
items.tagline: Local-first AI note app for Mac zero config via MCP
items.description: Novi Notes is a local-first Mac note app with built-in AI via MCP. Just install, open Claude, and ask — Claude reads and writes your notes directly. No plugins, no API keys, no config. Features: AI-native via MCP, 100% local and offline, daily notes, manuals, post-its & calendar, one-time purchase with no subscription. Built by an indie dev in Seoul.
